name: Garner Parks and Recreation
description: Garner Parks and Recreation is a place to play pickleball in Garner, IA. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights, wheelchair accessibility, water, youth programming, and restrooms.

name: Veterans Memorial Recreation Center
description: Courts are on a first come first serve basis. Facility is open to members 24/7.  Visitors must play during regular business hours and purchase a day pass.
fees: Fee required — $5 day pass required for non-members
